capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a change management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a change management service?

questions.prompt: Is the change management service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the change management service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have change management software to generate change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have change management software to generate change requests?

questions.prompt: Does the change management system cover the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the change management system cover the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries?

questions.prompt: Does the change management system support automation of approval of certain change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the change management system support automation of approval of certain change requests?

questions.prompt: Is the change management system configuration reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the change management system configuration reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the change management system integrate with segments like staging and risk management to support an efficient change management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the change management system integrate with segments like staging and risk management to support an efficient change management process?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with staging and risk management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management process?

questions.prompt: Does the change management process apply to the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the change management process apply to the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Is the change management process automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the change management process automated?

questions.prompt: Is the change management process reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the change management process reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented KPI/KRI for the change management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented KPI/KRI for the change management process?

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for change management reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the KPIs and KRIs for change management reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for subject changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for subject changes?

questions.prompt: Are all change management policies for subjects applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all change management policies for subjects applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are all policies for change management applicable to subjects reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all policies for change management applicable to subjects reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for network changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for network changes?

questions.prompt: Are all change management policies for network applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all change management policies for network applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are all policies for change management applicable to network reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all policies for change management applicable to network reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for endpoint changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for endpoint changes?

questions.prompt: Are all change management policies for endpoints applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all change management policies for endpoints applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are all policies for change management applicable to endpoints reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all policies for change management applicable to endpoints reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for application changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for application changes?

questions.prompt: Are all change management policies for applications applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all change management policies for applications applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are all policies for change management applicable to applications reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all policies for change management applicable to applications reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for data/database changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management policy for data/database changes?

questions.prompt: Are all change management policies for data/database applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all change management policies for data/database applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are all policies for change management applicable to data/database reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all policies for change management applicable to data/database reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a change management board that approves and denies change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a change management board that approves and denies change requests?

questions.prompt: Are the members of the CAB from across the enterprise, or is it specific to the function that implements the CAB?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the members of the CAB from across the enterprise, or is it specific to the function that implements the CAB?

questions.prompt: Does the CAB mandate impact analysis for all major change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the CAB mandate impact analysis for all major change requests?
questions.evaluation_focus: Impact analysis mandated for major changes

questions.prompt: Is there a formalized documented procedure a requestor must complete to provide the necessary details for impact analysis?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formalized documented procedure a requestor must complete to provide the necessary details for impact analysis?

questions.prompt: Can the impact analysis be automated as part of a CI/CD pipeline?
questions.intent: Evaluate can the impact analysis be automated as part of a CI/CD pipeline?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a change management baseline for all change request types?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a change management baseline for all change request types?
questions.evaluation_focus: Baselines for all change request types

questions.prompt: Are the change management baselines monitored and reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the change management baselines monitored and reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the visibility solution (SOC) in the enterprise have the capability to identify deviations from established change baselines?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the visibility solution (SOC) in the enterprise have the capability to identify deviations from established change baselines?

questions.prompt: Can a change management baseline deviation be identified across the entire enterprise, or is it deployed in a specific scope in the network?
questions.intent: Evaluate can a change management baseline deviation be identified across the entire enterprise, or is it deployed in a specific scope in the network?

questions.prompt: Are change management baseline deviations identified automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate are change management baseline deviations identified automatically?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an exception management process for changes that cannot be reviewed with expected impact analysis?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have an exception management process for changes that cannot be reviewed with expected impact analysis?
questions.evaluation_focus: Exception process for changes without impact analysis

questions.prompt: Is the exception management process deployed across the entire enterprise and cloud?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the exception management process deployed across the entire enterprise and cloud?

questions.prompt: Are change management exceptions reviewed after they have been deemed exceptions?
questions.intent: Evaluate are change management exceptions reviewed after they have been deemed exceptions?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have the capability to restore services in case the change fails?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have the capability to restore services in case the change fails?

questions.prompt: Is there a documented formalized process for restoration of services in case a change fails? Is this extracted from the vendor or technology partner?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a documented formalized process for restoration of services in case a change fails? Is this extracted from the vendor or technology partner?

questions.prompt: Are there automated processes in place to switch traffic and restore services in case of change failure?
questions.intent: Evaluate are there automated processes in place to switch traffic and restore services in case of change failure?

questions.prompt: Is the restoration process reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the restoration process reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Can restoration services integrate with management controllers to make necessary policy and network changes to facilitate the restoration?
questions.intent: Evaluate can restoration services integrate with management controllers to make necessary policy and network changes to facilitate the restoration?
